rationale: Provenance lens. The round-2 delta (git diff 21374bb8..389fcc41) touches exactly 2 production files and ZERO tests: `git diff -- '*_test.go'` is empty. Therefore every AC1-13 proof stands byte-identical and homed exactly where my round-1 cross-walk placed it. The change is a pure seam swap: implIsAncestorFn/implBranchExistsFn keep identical names, types, and injection points, now pointing at new thin lifecycle wrappers (lifecycle.IsAncestor/BranchExists) whose signatures match gitutil.IsAncestor/BranchExists exactly (verified against gitops.go:446/94). internal/approve no longer imports internal/gitutil (go list grep empty, exit 1), so ADR-0030 is honored without an allowlist exception. Verified: go build ./... clean (no import cycle), go test ./internal/approve ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/lint all PASS — internal/lint includes TestEnforcementHasNoGitLeaks (the S1/S3 blocker), now green. Only untracked path is the panel review dir; git otherwise clean. No AC provenance disturbance. My round-1 provenance APPROVE holds.
findings: Test diff 21374bb8..389fcc41 is empty — all AC1-13 provenance intact and unmoved.
Wrapper signatures identical to gitutil originals (IsAncestor(workdir,ancestor,descendant)(bool,error); BranchExists(name)bool) — seam-transparent.
internal/approve no longer imports internal/gitutil; ADR-0030 enforcement boundary honored without allowlist exception.
go build ./... clean (no import cycle); internal/approve, internal/lifecycle, internal/lint tests PASS including TestEnforcementHasNoGitLeaks.
git status clean except the expected panel reviews directory.
